sourcesContent:
const dsaData = [
  {
    id: "arrays", title: "Arrays", icon: "🗂️",
    description: "Foundation of DSA – master array manipulation and traversal",
    problems: [
      { id: "arr-1", title: "Find the Largest Element in an Array", level: "Easy",
        youtube: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=37E9ckMDdTk",
        leetcode: "https://leetcode.com/problems/find-the-highest-altitude/",
        article: "https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/c-program-find-largest-element-array/" },
      { id: "arr-2", title: "Second Largest Element in Array", level: "Easy",
        youtube: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=37E9ckMDdTk",
        leetcode: "https://leetcode.com/problems/second-largest-digit-in-a-string/",
        article: "https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/find-second-largest-element-array/" },
      { id: "arr-3", title: "Sort 0s, 1s, and 2s (Dutch National Flag)", level: "Medium",
        youtube: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tp8JIuCXBaU",
        leetcode: "https://leetcode.com/problems/sort-colors/",
        article: "https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/sort-an-array-of-0s-1s-and-2s/" },
      { id: "arr-4", title: "Maximum Subarray Sum (Kadane's Algorithm)", level: "Medium",
        youtube: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AHZpyENo7k4",
        leetcode: "https://leetcode.com/problems/maximum-subarray/",
        article: "https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/largest-sum-contiguous-subarray/" },
      { id: "arr-5", title: "Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock", level: "Easy",
        youtube: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ioFPBdChabY",
        leetcode: "https://leetcode.com/problems/best-time-to-buy-and-sell-stock/",
        article: "https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/stock-buy-sell/" },
      { id: "arr-6", title: "Rotate Matrix by 90 Degrees", level: "Medium",
        youtube: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y72QeX0Efxw",
        leetcode: "https://leetcode.com/problems/rotate-image/",
        article: "https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/rotate-a-matrix-by-90-degree-in-clockwise-direction-without-using-any-extra-space/" },
      { id: "arr-7", title: "Merge Overlapping Intervals", level: "Medium",
        youtube: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IexN60k62jo",
        leetcode: "https://leetcode.com/problems/merge-intervals/",
        article: "https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/merging-intervals/" },
      { id: "arr-8", title: "Trapping Rain Water", level: "Hard",
